title: P25 CLV Construction Fix — HDC / OU / TTO Line-Shift Bug

bug_summary.root_cause: HDC / OU / TTO outcome names encode the handicap / total line (e.g., '底特律老虎 -2.5', '大 8.5', '大 4.5'). The old (P22) CLV pipeline compared pregame and closing odds by array index position, ignoring outcome names. When the line shifted between pregame and closing, index[0] at pregame mapped to a *different line* than index[0] at closing, producing mathematically invalid CLV values.

fix_summary.approach: Name-based (line-aware) outcome matching. For HDC/OU/TTO, the outcome name is the key. If pregame name != closing name the pair is excluded. No index fallback is ever used.
fix_summary.mnl_unaffected: MNL uses team-name matching (no line in name). Two-way vs three-way shape mismatch is detected separately. Moneyline CLV computation is unchanged.
p25_api_fields_added: clv_status: CLV_COMPARABLE | LINE_SHIFT_UNCOMPARABLE | MISSING_OPENING_ODDS | MISSING_CLOSING_ODDS | UNSUPPORTED_MARKET
line_comparable: bool — True only when same line at pregame and closing
line_shift_detected: bool — True when LINE_MOVED or MARKET_SHAPE_MISMATCH
excluded_from_clean_clv: bool — True for any non-MATCHED result

wbc_clean_clv_restart.note: Line-shift rows will be marked excluded_from_clean_clv=true. CLV analysis must filter to line_comparable=true rows only.

remaining_blockers: MLB pregame-safe games = 0 (all post-game proxy). MLB CLV validation remains blocked until real-time TSL collection begins (2026 regular season).
Model quality insufficient: MLB walkforward Brier=0.2487 (near random), hit rate=46.25% < 50%. Even with clean CLV, model edge must be rebuilt separately.
P1 real Orchestrator w_market sweep: still blocked (MLB market_prob is post-game proxy).
